fields.name: Source Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service order or service contract.

fields.name: Destination Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document created from the service order or contract specified in the Source Document No.

fields.name: Destination Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the invoice or credit memo, based on the contents of the Destination Document Type field.
